// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TechCosmos.Core.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.InputSystem.Runtime;
using UnityEngine;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    public sealed class ControllerInputSource : IInputSource
    {
        private readonly InputHub _hub;
        private readonly EntityHandle _controller;
        private readonly List<Binding> _bindings = new();

        public ControllerInputSource(InputHub hub, EntityHandle controller)
        {
            _hub = hub ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(hub));
            _controller = controller;
        }

        public void BindKey(KeyCode key, string actionId, int slot = -1, InputPhase phase = InputPhase.Performed)
        {
            _bindings.Add(new Binding(key, actionId, slot, phase));
        }

        public void ClearBindings() => _bindings.Clear();

        public void Tick(float deltaTime)
        {
            float time = Time.time;

            for (int i = 0; i < _bindings.Count; i++)
            {
                var binding = _bindings[i];
                if (!Input.GetKeyDown(binding.Key)) continue;

                _hub.Emit(new InputIntent(
                    controller: _controller,
                    actionId: binding.ActionId,
                    phase: binding.Phase,
                    slot: binding.Slot,
                    time: time));
            }
        }

        private readonly struct Binding
        {
            public KeyCode Key { get; }
            public string ActionId { get; }
            public int Slot { get; }
            public InputPhase Phase { get; }

            public Binding(KeyCode key, string actionId, int slot, InputPhase phase)
            {
                Key = key;
                ActionId = actionId;
                Slot = slot;
                Phase = phase;
            }
        }
    }
}
